In C++, implement a function `copy_array` that securely copies elements from a source array to a destination array using `slow_copy_array` for `tstring` and `int32` types.
Generation:
For `int64` type, use `slow_copy_array` followed by `fast_copy_array`. The function should handle different data types and sizes, and ensure proper alignment and padding.

template<typename T>
static void copy_array(
    const T* source,
    size_t source_size,
    size_t source_alignment,
    size_t source_padding,
    T* destination,
    size_t destination_size,
    size_t destination_alignment,
    size_t destination_padding,
    size_t element_size,
    size_t element_alignment,
    size_t element_padding)
{
    if (element_size == sizeof(tstring))
        slow_copy_array(
            reinterpret_cast<tstring*>(destination),
            reinterpret_cast<const tstring*>(source),
            source_size,
            source_alignment,
            source_padding,
            destination_size,
            destination_alignment,
            destination_padding,
            element_alignment);
    else if (element_size == sizeof(int32))
        slow_copy_array(
            reinterpret_cast<int32*>(destination),
            reinterpret_cast<const int32*>(source),
            source_size,
            source_alignment,
            source_padding,
            destination_size,
            destination_alignment,
            destination_padding,
            element_alignment);
    else if (element_size == sizeof(int64))
    {
        slow_copy_array(
            reinterpret_cast<int64*>(destination),
            reinterpret_cast<const int64*>(source),
            source_size,
            source_alignment,
            source_padding,
            destination_size,
            destination_alignment,
            destination_padding,
            element_alignment);

        fast_copy_array(
            reinterpret_cast<int64*>(destination),
            reinterpret_cast<const int64*>(source),
            source_size,
            source_alignment,
            source_padding,
            destination_size,
            destination_alignment,
            destination_padding,
            element_alignment);
    }
}
